643.reason: [This lookahead logic is flawed because it assumes that any declaration must not have '(' two tokens ahead, but this fails when a VarDecl is followed by a function definition or when there are empty declarations. It may incorrectly stop parsing declarations too early or consume tokens meant for FuncDef.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [This lookahead logic is flawed because it assumes that any declaration must not have '(' two tokens ahead, but this fails when a VarDecl is followed by a function definition or when there are empty declarations. It may incorrectly stop parsing declarations too early or consume tokens meant for FuncDef.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [This lookahead logic is flawed because it assumes that any declaration must not have '(' at position +2, but a VarDecl could be followed by a FuncDef starting with 'int' 'funcname' '(', and the lookahead doesn't properly distinguish between VarDecl and FuncDef. Also, if there are no declarations, this may incorrectly skip valid function definitions.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [This lookahead logic is flawed because it assumes that any declaration must not be followed by '(' two tokens ahead, but variable declarations can be followed by function definitions that start with 'int'/'char' and then an identifier and '(', which would break this condition prematurely]

648.reason: [This lookahead is also unreliable because it assumes the next token after current position being MAINTK indicates the start of main function, but if there are no FuncDefs, this may skip valid tokens or cause incorrect parsing. Also, if MAINTK appears unexpectedly, it may lead to infinite loops or missed function definitions.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [This lookahead is also unreliable because it assumes the next token after current position being MAINTK indicates the start of main function, but if there are no FuncDefs, this may skip valid tokens or cause incorrect parsing. Also, if MAINTK appears unexpectedly, it may lead to infinite loops or missed function definitions.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [This lookahead is also incorrect because it assumes that all functions before main will have their identifier at +1 position followed by something other than MAINTK, but it doesn't verify that the current token is actually a valid FuncType. This can cause misclassification of tokens or infinite loops when encountering unexpected input.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [This lookahead is also incorrect because it assumes all function definitions come before main, but the grammar allows functions to appear before or after declarations, and this condition may skip valid function definitions or include non-function tokens]
